title: brachyscome multifida var. multifida
intro: Brachyscome multifida var. multifida, also known as the cut-leaf daisy, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family that is native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachyscome multifida var. multifida include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
